about.title: About us
about.body: Rentmi is the most trusted home rental platform in Uzbekistan. We connect owners and tenants safely, transparently and conveniently.

scoredTenants.desc: Only tenants who passed scoring appear on Rentmi — for owners this provides the tenant's history and how they lived in their previous homes

download.title: Download the app for free
download.desc: The easiest way to manage your real estate.

items.1: Through Rentmi I found a great home within just a few days. The process was very transparent and easy — all the paperwork was done online. Talking to the owner was convenient too, and I moved in without any hassle. Now I happily recommend it to my friends.
items.2: Thanks to the scoring system, the owner trusted me very quickly. Finding a rental used to take weeks; with Rentmi everything was sorted in a single day. Payments and the contract are in the app too — very convenient and well organized.
items.3: I signed the contract online and didn't have to go anywhere. Support answered every question quickly and clearly. I didn't expect this level of service — it's genuinely excellent.

items.1: *8 useful features* of *Rentmi* you didn't know

1.q: What if the owner evicts me before the term ends?
1.a: The contract terms protect both parties; disputes are resolved through Rentmi support.

2.a: Registration and browsing listings are free. Some additional services may be paid.

3.q: How can I improve my score?
3.a: Verify your data via MyID and IHamkor and complete your rental history.

4.q: Is signing the contract online safe?
4.a: Yes, all signatures are legally binding via electronic digital signature.

5.a: Payments go through the platform in a secure, protected payment system.
